creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
First of all, sorry if I did sound rude in my reply, I really did not mean to.


I did not reject your submission, it works quite fine regarding mame, And I'm quite willing to commit it.

My problem with it is that committing it as is will cause another related port to become broken. Due to the structure of the ports tree, being mess a slave port, updating mame will automatically update mess too and with this patch cause it to be broken.

There's no easy way to avoid this at present.

This does not mean this PR is rejected, just that it needs refining. I'd relly like you to open this bug report again and try to file a patch fixing mess too.

I was even planning having a look at that, but did not explicitly offer to do that because I don't have time for that right now, but could find some in a few days.

Sorry again if I was rude.
